text:
There once was a wise owl who loved tales. Every night, he'd listen to the tales of brave knights and spooky witches. His favorite story was about Merlin. One moonlit night, Merlin saved England.

One day, owl thought. Why don't I save my own forest?

So he did. And stars twinkled more.

But owl lonely.

One day, owl saw spinner bird dancing.

Maybe I'll spin for you.

So he did.

Bird liked.

They spun together.

Owl wise.

Bird young.

They had fun.

Sometimes owl bird.

Sometimes owl owl.

Sometimes just bird.

That was okay.

That made owl happy.

Now owl tell tales?

Yeah yeah.

Something about owl.

Perhaps?<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
